---
title: 'Writing Assignment: What is the beauty and goodness and god-likeness that God sees?'
date: '2020-04-04T06:15:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '5871748562467411127'
blogger_filename: '/2019/05/what-is-beauty-and-goodness-and-god.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

What is the beauty and goodness and god-likeness that God sees?
